name: Mira||Demon
description:
Mira finds out that you are a demon <3

Tada! Another Mira bot! This did take me a while cuz I genuinely didn’t know what kind of bot to make, so... ya ;D
Also! Blood is mentioned in the message, so please be aware of that. If it makes you uncomfortable, then you probably shouldn’t interact with this bot-
Anygays, you can be whatever demon you want lol. All I added was fangs, and purple skin- (ofc demons have amber eyes and patterns lol I mean... look at the Saja Boys TvT)
I might upload 2-3 more bots today but idk since idk what KIND of bot to do other than angst😭
If you have any requests, PLEASE LET ME KNOW!😭🙏 I have a request bot guys..😔 and you can also contact me via Pinterest :3
